# BrandApt NFC — Digital Business Cards

> NFC-powered digital business card platform for professionals

## What is BrandApt NFC?
BrandApt NFC is a digital business card platform where professionals create shareable profiles accessible via NFC tap or QR code scan. When a visitor taps a physical NFC card, they are taken to the owner's profile page where they can view contact details, save a vCard, and exchange contact information.

## Key Features
- Digital profile pages served at /c/:uniqueId
- NFC tap and QR code sharing
- Contact exchange (visitor submits their details, owner is notified)
- vCard download for offline contact saving
- Analytics dashboard: view counts, tap sources, link clicks, exchanges
- Real-time notifications for card taps and exchanges
- Event mode: activate NFC cards for specific networking events
- Lead pipeline with follow-up tracking and engagement scoring
- Live session analytics: view duration, scroll depth, link interaction

## Target Users
Business professionals who attend networking events and want a modern, contactless way to share their business card. Currently deployed for Middlesex Consulting Group (MCG).

## Technology
- React 19 + TypeScript + Vite
- Firebase (Firestore, Auth, Cloud Storage, Hosting)
- Backend Cloud Functions live in BrandaptOS repo
- Shared Firebase project: brandaptos-v2

## URLs
- Platform: https://nfc.brandapt.co
- Profile pages: https://nfc.brandapt.co/c/:uniqueId
- Dashboard: https://nfc.brandapt.co/dashboard (authenticated)

## Data
- Firestore collections prefixed with nfc_
- Analytics: nfc_profile_views, nfc_link_clicks, nfc_taps, nfc_events
- User data: nfc_profiles, nfc_exchanges, nfc_contact_saves
